message:
refactor(storage): remove dead filter_issues_by_labels and unconditionally apply SQL LIMIT

All label filtering now happens in SQL via JOINs, making the Rust-side
filter_issues_by_labels method unreachable. Remove the method and the
apply_label_filters_in_rust guard around LIMIT, so the SQL LIMIT clause
is always emitted when filters.limit is set. This eliminates a
post-query truncation path and ~36 lines of dead code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
